metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore food systems from a scientific, cultural, and sustainability perspective. This course covers advanced food science, global cuisines, food security, agricultural systems, and the interconnections between food, health, environment, and society.
metadata.general_description: Food science, global cuisines, food security, and sustainable agricultural and food systems.

big_ideas.statement: Food systems encompass complex networks connecting agriculture, production, distribution, and consumption
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding food systems requires examining how food is grown, processed, transported, marketed, and consumed globally.

big_ideas.statement: Food science explains the chemical and biological processes underlying cooking, food safety, and nutrition
big_ideas.elaboration: Scientific knowledge of ingredients, reactions, and microorganisms enables food preservation, safety, and quality improvement.

big_ideas.statement: Food security and equity require addressing hunger, nutrition, and access to healthy food across diverse populations
big_ideas.elaboration: Many people face food insecurity due to poverty, geographic barriers, and systemic inequities requiring multifaceted solutions.

big_ideas.statement: Sustainable agriculture and food systems balance environmental health, economic viability, and social well-being
big_ideas.elaboration: Sustainable practices protect soil, water, and biodiversity while supporting farmer livelihoods and food security.

competencies.raw: Design nutritious and culturally appropriate meals and menus
i_can_statements: I can apply nutrition science to develop balanced meals
I can accommodate diverse dietary needs and preferences
I can incorporate multicultural and traditional cuisines
I can plan meals within budget constraints

competencies.raw: Design sustainable food systems and practices
i_can_statements: I can plan menus incorporating local and sustainable ingredients
I can design food waste reduction strategies
I can develop sustainable food sourcing practices
I can create plans to support food security

competencies.raw: Design food science experiments and applications
i_can_statements: I can plan food science investigations
I can design food preservation experiments
I can create solutions using food science principles
I can develop food safety protocols

competencies.raw: Design food education and advocacy initiatives
i_can_statements: I can develop nutrition education programs
I can create food literacy campaigns
I can advocate for food justice and equity
I can design community food projects

competencies.raw: Apply food science knowledge to food preparation and preservation
i_can_statements: I can explain chemical and biological food processes
I can apply food preservation techniques safely
I can evaluate food quality and shelf life
I can troubleshoot food science problems

competencies.raw: Apply nutrition knowledge to food planning and selection
i_can_statements: I can calculate nutrition content and create balanced meals
I can assess individual and population nutrition needs
I can evaluate food labels and make healthy choices
I can address nutrition across the lifespan

competencies.raw: Apply knowledge of food systems to sustainable choices
i_can_statements: I can analyze environmental impacts of food choices
I can evaluate food sourcing and production methods
I can support sustainable and ethical agriculture
I can reduce personal food waste

competencies.raw: Apply global food knowledge to understand cultural cuisines
i_can_statements: I can analyze traditional and global cuisines
I can prepare dishes from diverse food cultures
I can understand food's role in cultural identity
I can adapt and create fusion cuisine

competencies.raw: Use technology to analyze and communicate food science
i_can_statements: I can use laboratory equipment for food testing
I can analyze data and interpret results
I can use digital tools for food science research
I can present findings and conclusions

competencies.raw: Use nutrition and food analysis software
i_can_statements: I can use nutrition analysis applications
I can calculate and track nutrient content
I can create nutrition reports and recommendations
I can analyze dietary patterns

competencies.raw: Use digital tools for food systems research and advocacy
i_can_statements: I can research food systems and food security issues
I can analyze agricultural and environmental data
I can create digital presentations on food topics
I can engage in online food advocacy

competencies.raw: Use technology to document and share food knowledge
i_can_statements: I can photograph and document food preparation
I can create recipe content and food media
I can develop digital food resources
I can share food knowledge through technology

areas.name: Food Science and Food Safety
topics: Food additives and food safety standards

areas.name: Global Cuisines and Food Culture
topics: Ingredient and flavor profiles across regions
Indigenous food systems and traditional knowledge
Contemporary food trends and fusion cooking
